comment: Merge the hooks block into your .claude/settings.json. Same script handles both events.

env_you_can_set.RG_MODEL: claude-fable-5 (default) — or a cheaper model for the reviewer
env_you_can_set.RG_EFFORT: optional; high|medium|low — Fable/Mythos only; auto-dropped if unsupported
env_you_can_set.RG_GOAL_FILE: GOAL.md — restate the task here so the reviewer has an anchor
env_you_can_set.RG_LEDGER_FILE: PROGRESS.md — the append-only progress ledger the no-progress trip watches
env_you_can_set.RG_MAX_REVIEWS: 6 — hard per-session cap on paid Fable calls
env_you_can_set.RG_REVIEW_COOLDOWN: 5 — min tool calls between paid reviews
